text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the autumn Tenno Sho in the books, Mejiro
McQueen and I decide to have a holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having purchased cake, groceries, and a variety
of other things, I make my way back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, Trainer. Welcome back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Judging from your demeanor, you haven't
yet noticed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You see, I added a decoration while you were
absent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well? Can you find it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look around the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a small, wrapped cookie sitting on the
desk! What's more, it's shaped like the plaque of
the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You seem to have spotted it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I used a mold to make it into the shape of a
shield. I know it isn't much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But it's my way of showing thanks for leading me
toward my victories in the Twin Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please savor and enjoy this token of my esteem.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try Mejiro McQueen's handmade, shield-shaped
cookie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What's that?! Let me try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crunch...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh... You're right. This is definitely burnt...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I tried so hard to make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I see. After all, the emotions I felt as I made
this for you were genuine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As long as I was able to convey my feelings, that
is enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy the rest of our holiday party, taking
things easier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to try Mejiro McQueen's handmade,
shield-shaped cookie.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my, really?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness... I put my heart into making it,
and now I know it was all worth the effort.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's a relief to see the smile on your face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. You know how much effort I've been
putting toward my goal all this time, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After all that work, I successfully achieved my
goal, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps as a consequence of my single-minded
focus, I feel that I've neglected a part of my
personal life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So, when I saw your smile just now, it gave me a
sense of relief. I can celebrate without restraint.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes... absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Since that's settled, why don't we get our glasses
and have a toast?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we cut loose and enjoy our holiday
party until curfew.
